bird.name: Lina's sunbird
bird.summary: Lina's sunbird (Aethopyga linaraborae) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae It is endemic to mountains in the island of Mindana…

relations.subject: Lina's sunbird
relations.evidence: We are pleased to name this new and beautiful sunbird after this remarkable person}} Its natural habitat is tropical moist montane forest above 1000m
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Lina's sunbird
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Lina's sunbird
relations.evidence: Tagubud in New Bataan, where it is mainly seen by birdwatchers, has faced considerable deforestation
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
